steps.command: wp option update blogname '東京都私学財団 提案デモ'
wp option update blogdescription '営業共有用のWordPress Playgroundデモ'
wp menu item add-custom 'Primary Navigation' '制度情報' '/programs/'
wp menu item add-custom 'Primary Navigation' '財団について' '/about/'
wp menu item add-custom 'Primary Navigation' 'お知らせ' '/news/'
wp menu item add-custom 'Primary Navigation' 'お問い合わせ' '/contact/'

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $menu = wp_get_nav_menu_object('Primary Navigation'); $locations = get_theme_mod('nav_menu_locations'); if (!is_array($locations)) { $locations = array(); } $locations['primary'] = $menu->term_id; set_theme_mod('nav_menu_locations', $locations); ?>
